# Qezta

> Qezta is the landing site for qezta.com.

## Site

- [Home](https://qezta.com/): Marketing and landing page for Qezta.
- [Divit Mittal](https://divit.qezta.com/): Personal portfolio site connected to Qezta.
- [Sitemap](https://qezta.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for crawlable site URLs.
- [Robots](https://qezta.com/robots.txt): Crawler access policy.
